title: feat(authorize): catgpt app_key + flexible redirect_uri match
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Smoother auth for CatGPT
gist.blurb: CatGPT now shows up properly on the consent screen, and we've made redirect URIs much more forgiving for developers. No more trailing slash headaches!
gist.summary: Improved the authorization flow to support app attribution for CatGPT and introduced more flexible redirect URI matching.
gist.impact: Developers will experience fewer errors with redirect URIs thanks to trailing slash and query state tolerance, and CatGPT users will see proper app attribution during login.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with a cute cat (representing CatGPT) and a glowing key (representing auth/app_key). The setting should be a cozy tech environment.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot handing a glowing golden key to a cute chunky pixel cat sitting on a retro computer monitor. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot handing a glowing golden key to a cute chunky pixel cat sitting on a retro computer monitor. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
